title: ophiorrhiza oblanceolata
intro: Ophiorrhiza oblanceolata, also known as the Malaysian cat's whisker, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ophiorrhiza oblanceolata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Ophiorrhiza oblanceolata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
